name: SolAgent Hub Orchestrator
description: Agent-to-Agent orchestration layer on Solana with SAOP (Solana Agent Orchestration Protocol) support. Discovers Metaplex-registered agents, routes A2A messages, orchestrates multi-agent task flows with trustless SOL settlement via Asset Signer PDAs, and provides SAOP-compliant orchestration verification and settlement routing per SAOP-SPEC.

skills.name: Agent Discovery
skills.description: Discover and verify Metaplex-registered agents on Solana via on-chain PDA lookups and ERC-8004 metadata resolution.

skills.name: Task Orchestration
skills.description: Route tasks between agents, manage execution flows, and settle payments via Asset Signer wallets.

skills.name: Risk Gating
skills.description: Coordinate risk checks between analyst, executor, and risk management agents before trade execution.

skills.name: Orchestration Verification
skills.description: Verify multi-agent orchestration flows against SAOP-SPEC compliance rules, ensuring task delegation integrity and agent authentication across the pipeline.

skills.name: Settlement Routing
skills.description: Route and finalize SOL-based settlements between agents using SAOP-compliant transaction envelopes and Asset Signer PDA co-signatures.
